text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I see, so it's like the saying goes, "the dirt is
always stronger on the other side".

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I write sayings in my Chiyonotes.
The little insights I have every day might
be useful someday!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, that's my proverb. Feel free to write
that one down.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, thank… Wait. Don't speed and velocity
mean the same thing?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Speed is what you gain from training.
Velocity, you have to work up to through
exercise!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I see! I'd better write that down! "Speed is…"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I feel like training and exercise
also mean the same thing here…
